textRun.content: From Legacy Platform to Next-Gen Data Estate
60 Minutes to Align, Plan, and Launch
Meet your extended Atlan CX team
Platform transition, CDO vision, and strategic context
A dedicated cross-functional team aligned to Eaton's data estate vision
Your primary partner. Owns success plan, OKR tracking, and executive alignment.
Your trusted advisor and partner in maximizing your value with Atlan.
Deep technical guidance on architecture, integrations, and best practices, and manages migration
Builds your integrations—Snowflake, Power BI, SAP—and supports migration.
Extended team: Kevin Urban (AE) · Brad Treesh (CX Leader) · Rohit Agarwal (Migration) · Brian McCarthy (Strategic Advisor)
Serves as the technical expert; identifies compatibility and technical feasibility
From kickoff to sustainable business value
Focused assets & team to build supply
into game changer w/ big scope
E.g. Improved investment returns from AI recommendations
The Journey to Sustainable Business Value

This is what you want to create an ongoing cycle. Each company initiative or domain you seek to understand and support with Atlan will reveal new user stories with new data needs and a new supply of metadata to be connected, updated, or created. As the needs of your company and colleagues change, so should the supply of metadata in Atlan.

A healthy, continuous supply of metadata enrichment will feed the demand for metadata and reinforce the behavior that Atlan is the place where people can find what they need – creating credibility and aiding in adoption.
So how should you go about creating that supply? How do you start your metadata enrichment? And maybe more importantly, where should you start your metadata enrichment?
Rollout Overview — From Kickoff to Scale -Finance & SCM
Solid bars = active phase · Faded bars = planned duration · Timeline refined at kickoff
From legacy platform to the foundation of Eaton's AI-powered data estate
Everything we build together maps back to these outcomes
Not about logins—about measurable value from the data estate. Atlan embedded in how work gets done, not sitting alongside it.
• Alation reaching limits—adoption growing but deep user frustration
The Case for Change — By Domain
MCP live for 1 agentic use case
Source: Ross Schalmo (CDO) on Gong 3/20 + 3/30 · Chris Higgins leadership alignment · Technical Assessment
All three have significant overlapping data assets and KPI redundancy
Build supply ahead of demand. Eaton's SAP+Snowflake+PBI = massive supply. Ross's AI ambitions = natural demand.
Migrate assets, Document Hubs, glossary. Validate parity. Buffer before sunset.
Snowflake + PBI prod integration. PrivateLink, BYOC/SSO, lineage, DQ Studio.
Contributor rollout May 1. End-user training. Access workflows. Usage dashboards.
Day 45 Context Studio intro. Agentic roadmap with Ross. MCP + semantic layer.
First 5-10 days are ultra-critical. Security/SSO teams historically slow—escalation path from Day 1.
Sprint to Production — Every Day Counts
Detailed milestones, risk management, and how we work together
Priority #1 — Complete Before Alation Turns Off
Aggressive timeline: migration must be complete at least two weeks before contract end
The "catalog ready" green flag and Alation sunset date must NOT be the same. Build buffer between contributor rollout (~May 1) and Alation end date.
Risks & Mitigations — What Could Slow Us Down
Every risk has an owner and a timeline. Bi-weekly risk review. Escalation to Ross/Brad if blocked >48 hours.
Technical progress review, blocker resolution, next-week planning.
OKR progress, risk dashboard, strategic decisions.
Real-time questions, async updates, document sharing. Response SLA: same business day.
Context Studio demo, agentic roadmap, partnership on AI capabilities.
How We'll Measure Progress Against Ross's OKRs
Timing and baseline measurement feasibility to be discussed, timelines above are placeholders only
Not about logins—about measurable value from the data estate. — Ross Schalmo, CDO
Saurabh + Jared to book production setup + Alation extraction sessions by EOD Friday
Hari + Jared to loop in security team this week (Kevin facilitating intro)—cannot wait until Day 1
Chris to provide first 15 contributor names + Power BI workspace inclusion list
Next Touchpoint: Weekly Implementation Sync — Friday · Greg + Graysen + Hari + Saurabh + Jared + Chris
